features: High quality: Made from premium kraft paper, strong enough to carry up to 4 kg.
Bulk purchase: Comes in a set of 20 pcs bags that stand upright with matching twisted handles for easy carrying.
Eco-friendly: Made from recyclable materials, these bags are biodegradable and a sustainable alternative to plastic bags.
Versatility: Suitable for various occasions such as birthdays, weddings, parties, or everyday use for shopping or carrying groceries.

These party paper bags with handles offer high quality, strength, eco-friendliness, versatility, and customization options, making them perfect for a wide range of occasions and needs. With their sturdy construction, eco-friendly materials, they provide an excellent solution for gift-giving, shopping, and more.
